prompt: Which course sections have the most overbooked ratio (enrolled / max)?

inputData.question: Which course sections have the most overbooked ratio (enrolled / max)?

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"Which course sections have the most overbooked ratio (enrolled / max)?"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"Which course sections have the most overbooked ratio (enrolled / max)?"},"startedAt":1771804370344,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"Count active enrollments per course_section, compute enrolled / max_students (handling max_students = 0), and return the top 10 sections ordered by highest overbooked ratio (deterministic tie-breakers). Preflight inspected public.course_sections and public.enrollments to confirm columns used.","sql":"WITH enrolled AS (
  SELECT
    e.course_section_id AS course_section_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE e.is_active = true) AS enrolled_count
  FROM public.enrollments e
  GROUP BY e.course_section_id
)
SELECT
  cs.id AS section_id,
  cs.course_id AS course_id,
  cs.academic_year AS academic_year,
  cs.semester_type AS semester_type,
  cs.section_number AS section_number,
  cs.max_students AS max_students,
  COALESCE(en.enrolled_count, 0) AS enrolled_count,
  CASE
    WHEN cs.max_students = 0 AND COALESCE(en.enrolled_count, 0) > 0 THEN 1e9
    WHEN cs.max_students = 0 THEN NULL
    ELSE COALESCE(en.enrolled_count, 0)::numeric / cs.max_students
  END AS overbooked_ratio
FROM public.course_sections cs
LEFT JOIN enrolled en ON cs.id = en.course_section_id
ORDER BY overbooked_ratio DESC NULLS LAST, enrolled_count DESC, cs.id
LIMIT 10;","assumptions":["Count only active enrollments (enrollments.is_active = true).","Return the top 10 course sections by overbooked ratio.","Treat sections with max_students = 0 and enrolled_count > 0 as extremely overbooked (represented with a very large numeric 1e9 for ranking)."]},"endedAt":1771804401040},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"WITH enrolled AS (
  SELECT
    e.course_section_id AS course_section_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE e.is_active = true) AS enrolled_count
  FROM public.enrollments e
  GROUP BY e.course_section_id
)
SELECT
  cs.id AS section_id,
  cs.course_id AS course_id,
  cs.academic_year AS academic_year,
  cs.semester_type AS semester_type,
  cs.section_number AS section_number,
  cs.max_students AS max_students,
  COALESCE(en.enrolled_count, 0) AS enrolled_count,
  CASE
    WHEN cs.max_students = 0 AND COALESCE(en.enrolled_count, 0) > 0 THEN 1e9
    WHEN cs.max_students = 0 THEN NULL
    ELSE COALESCE(en.enrolled_count, 0)::numeric / cs.max_students
  END AS overbooked_ratio
FROM public.course_sections cs
LEFT JOIN enrolled en ON cs.id = en.course_section_id
ORDER BY overbooked_ratio DESC NULLS LAST, enrolled_count DESC, cs.id
LIMIT 10;"},"startedAt":1771804401043,"status":"success","output":{"ok":true,"sql":"WITH enrolled AS (

course sections have the most overbooked ratio (enrolled / max)?"},"result":{"sql":"WITH enrolled AS (
  SELECT
    e.course_section_id AS course_section_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE e.is_active = true) AS enrolled_count
  FROM public.enrollments e
  GROUP BY e.course_section_id
)
SELECT
  cs.id AS section_id,
  cs.course_id AS course_id,
  cs.academic_year AS academic_year,
  cs.semester_type AS semester_type,
  cs.section_number AS section_number,
  cs.max_students AS max_students,
  COALESCE(en.enrolled_count, 0) AS enrolled_count,
  CASE
    WHEN cs.max_students = 0 AND COALESCE(en.enrolled_count, 0) > 0 THEN 1e9
    WHEN cs.max_students = 0 THEN NULL
    ELSE COALESCE(en.enrolled_count, 0)::numeric / cs.max_students
  END AS overbooked_ratio
FROM public.course_sections cs
LEFT JOIN enrolled en ON cs.id = en.course_section_id

visualization.description: Top course sections by overbooked ratio (enrolled / max_students).
visualization.title: Top 10 Course Sections by Overbooked Ratio (enrolled / max_students)

resultRaw.sql:
WITH enrolled AS (
  SELECT
    e.course_section_id AS course_section_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE e.is_active = true) AS enrolled_count
  FROM public.enrollments e
  GROUP BY e.course_section_id
)
SELECT
  cs.id AS section_id,
  cs.course_id AS course_id,
  cs.academic_year AS academic_year,
  cs.semester_type AS semester_type,
  cs.section_number AS section_number,
  cs.max_students AS max_students,
  COALESCE(en.enrolled_count, 0) AS enrolled_count,
  CASE
    WHEN cs.max_students = 0 AND COALESCE(en.enrolled_count, 0) > 0 THEN 1e9
    WHEN cs.max_students = 0 THEN NULL
    ELSE COALESCE(en.enrolled_count, 0)::numeric / cs.max_students
  END AS overbooked_ratio
FROM public.course_sections cs
LEFT JOIN enrolled en ON cs.id = en.course_section_id
ORDER BY overbooked_ratio DESC NULLS LAST, enrolled_count DESC, cs.id
LIMIT 10;

visualization.description: Top course sections by overbooked ratio (enrolled / max_students).
visualization.title: Top 10 Course Sections by Overbooked Ratio (enrolled / max_students)

result.sql:
WITH enrolled AS (
  SELECT
    e.course_section_id AS course_section_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE e.is_active = true) AS enrolled_count
  FROM public.enrollments e
  GROUP BY e.course_section_id
)
SELECT
  cs.id AS section_id,
  cs.course_id AS course_id,
  cs.academic_year AS academic_year,
  cs.semester_type AS semester_type,
  cs.section_number AS section_number,
  cs.max_students AS max_students,
  COALESCE(en.enrolled_count, 0) AS enrolled_count,
  CASE
    WHEN cs.max_students = 0 AND COALESCE(en.enrolled_count, 0) > 0 THEN 1e9
    WHEN cs.max_students = 0 THEN NULL
    ELSE COALESCE(en.enrolled_count, 0)::numeric / cs.max_students
  END AS overbooked_ratio
FROM public.course_sections cs
LEFT JOIN enrolled en ON cs.id = en.course_section_id
ORDER BY overbooked_ratio DESC NULLS LAST, enrolled_count DESC, cs.id
LIMIT 10;
